'''pazhatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabballah|kabballah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-zh-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabballah|kabballah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| pazhatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzhæthæth|pæzhæthæth]] || [[word:pæzhæthæj|pæzhæthæj]] || [[word:pæzhæthæsh|pæzhæthæsh]] || [[word:pæzhæthæ|pæzhæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazhazhathath|pazhazhathath]] || [[word:pazhazhathaj|pazhazhathaj]] || [[word:pazhazhathash|pazhazhathash]] || [[word:pazhazhatha|pazhazhatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazhathath|pazhathath]] || [[word:pazhathaj|pazhathaj]] || [[word:pazhathash|pazhathash]] || [[word:pazhatha|pazhatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazhafthath|pazhafthath]] || [[word:pazhafthaj|pazhafthaj]] || [[word:pazhafthash|pazhafthash]] || [[word:pazhafthaf|pazhafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazhathatha|pazhathatha]] || [[word:pazhathaja|pazhathaja]] || [[word:pazhathasha|pazhathasha]] || [[word:pazhathaka|pazhathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazhathath|pazhathath]] || [[word:pazhathaj|pazhathaj]] || [[word:pazhathash|pazhathash]] || [[word:pazhatha|pazhatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazhathathal|pazhathathal]] || [[word:pazhathajal|pazhathajal]] || [[word:pazhathashal|pazhathashal]] || [[word:pazhathakal|pazhathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazhathathatha|pazhathathatha]] || [[word:pazhathajaja|pazhathajaja]] || [[word:pazhathashasha|pazhathashasha]] || [[word:pazhathaka|pazhathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazhathathan|pazhathathan]] || [[word:pazhathajan|pazhathajan]] || [[word:pazhathashan|pazhathashan]] || [[word:pazhathakan|pazhathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazhathathaoro|pazhathathaoro]] || [[word:pazhathajaoro|pazhathajaoro]] || [[word:pazhathashaoro|pazhathashaoro]] || [[word:pazhathakaoro|pazhathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
